title: Estimand — one specific scientific claim a question lets us make
description: Per MANAGER_SPEC.md §3.5. An estimand is one specific thing you'd like to estimate within a research question. A single question can have many estimands at different status levels: 'observed_inheritance_effects' may be estimable while 'sex_specific_recombination_rates' is needs_extra_data. status is COMPUTED by lib/estimability.py — authors set preconditions[] + limitations[].

attribute.description: Required when kind=sample_attribute. Resolved against sample_attributes.jsonl.

required.description: When false, missing this precondition downgrades status to partially_estimable rather than not_estimable.

limitations.description: Free-text caveats applied even when the estimand is estimable.
